title: assignment setting
text: assignment setting A configuration definition in an assignment file that determines one aspect of a Uniface application's environment or behavior. Assignment settings can define the location of application resources and log files, application logicals, the default language and library, default properties of widgets, and system settings that influence the runtime behavior. Sets environment variables for the development, testing and production of the application. Specifies the language to be used for messages and help texts. Specifies the keyboard translation table and device translation table to be used. Defines the location of DBMS tables referenced by the application. Defines a logical name that can be accessed with the $logical ProcScript function. Defines the location of non-DBMS files accessed by an application and specifies where components are executed. Defines any Uniface system setting, to influence run-time behavior. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
